summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today. an decrease of 0.19% throughout the day; some traders were negativeto sell, Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of mulƟ-frequency procurement strategy. PBF at Shandong port dealt 795- 805 yuan/mt; decreased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday..
